source_description: Charter amendment: hoist the existing 'greenfield removal' sub-clause inside DIR-001 into its own top-level directive (DIR-003) with severity:error, so it surfaces in compact charter context loads and applies on every /spec-kitty.specify and /spec-kitty.plan invocation. Author preference codified: remove bad architecture, no compatibility shims, no @deprecated wrappers — no matter the cost.
